choices: is using wrap to wrap a pair of skis.
is ripping level tiles off.

then throws the ball into the pool and begins running around with a sail in his hand while a group of men watch.
then takes a drink having a conversation with another man and another man leads into him throwing balls in the water and laughing to the camera.

in the small blue boat holds a fish in his hands and then holds the fish while talking about the technique needed to perform this activity.
